title: tomocraft
description:
A Vanilla+ experience with subtle enhancements.
Improved animations, better terrain, new structures, QoL tweaks, a minimap, and even a few custom bosses. Perfect for players who love vanilla Minecraft but want a smoother, richer, and slightly expanded adve
body:
A refined **Vanilla+** experience built for players who love Minecraft's core gameplay but crave a touch of enhancement. This modpack stays true to the original feel of the game while introducing subtle yet meaningful improvements across the board.

From smoother animations and enriched environmental details like water, particles, and biome ambience, to quality-of-life upgrades such as a minimap, improved world generation, and enhanced structures — everything is designed to elevate immersion without overwhelming the player.

For the technically-minded, there are some “borderline cheat” features like crafting recipes for previously uncraftable items and optional new bosses to challenge. It's not about breaking the game — it's about bending it just enough to make it better.

Perfect for those who want more from vanilla, without losing what makes it special.

_If you encounter any issues or mod incompatibilities, feel free to contact me on Twitter: @gokuzazo_
